# homebrew-popi

Homebrew tap for `popiart`.

This repository stores Homebrew formulae generated from the release artifacts of [`wtgoku-create/popiartcli`](https://github.com/wtgoku-create/popiartcli).

## Install

```sh
brew tap wtgoku-create/popi
brew install wtgoku-create/popi/popiart
```

## Upgrade

```sh
brew update
brew upgrade wtgoku-create/popi/popiart
```

## What lives here

- `Formula/popiart.rb`: Homebrew formula for the `popiart` CLI

The formula is updated automatically by GoReleaser when a new release is published from the source repository.

## Source repository

- Source: <https://github.com/wtgoku-create/popiartcli>
- Releases: <https://github.com/wtgoku-create/popiartcli/releases>
